title: Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 released for MA Psychology 4th Semester re-exam and BCA 2nd Semester rescheduled exams. Check revised May/June 2026 schedule at kuk.ac.in.

content.text: Kurukshetra University has released the Date Sheet 2026 notifications for re-examination of MA Psychology 4th Semester (NEP) and re-schedule of BCA 2nd Semester (Old NEP for IIHS) Theory Examinations, May/June 2026. Students can now check the updated schedule on the official university website.

sections.heading: Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Kurukshetra University has issued specific notifications regarding rescheduling and re-examination for the following programmes:

sections.heading: How to Download Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can check the Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official website of Kurukshetra University.
Navigate to the Date Sheet or Examination section.
Look for the notifications N-46 (MA Psychology) and N-45 (BCA).
Click on the relevant date sheet notification link.
Download and save the PDF for reference.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official notifications and check the revised dates carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official Kurukshetra University Date Sheet 2026 notifications contain the following key details:
